LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.TakeOverControlTip: When enabled, Colony Manager Redux takes over deciding when to enable/disable sowing and harvesting, mod-wide, in place of Farming Hysteresis's own always-on control. Growers not covered by any Farming Hysteresis manager job are left uncontrolled while this is on.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.GrowerScope.All.Ti: Every eligible grower on the map not already claimed by another Farming Hysteresis job is managed by this job.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.GrowerScope.Area.T: Only growers within (or outside, if inverted) a chosen area are managed by this job.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.GrowerScope.Specif: Only the growers you explicitly select are managed by this job.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.GrowerScope.NoElig: No eligible growers found on this map yet.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.GrowerScope.Manage: Already managed by another Farming Hysteresis job ({0}). A grower can only be controlled by one job at a time.
